name: Line dance workshops for groups
description: Discover Line dance workshops for groups in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Line dance workshops for groups in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Dancing
subcategory.description: Dancing is fun and suitable for people of all ages who love movement. You will find a wide range of teaching options, from classical ballet to modern dance styles such as hip-hop or street dance. Dancing in groups is a great way to share the joy of dance and make new friends. They offer a supportive environment in which you can work on choreographies together and motivate each other. As well as giving you the opportunity to express yourself artistically, it's also a great way to de-stress and develop your own personality.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
